title: I Danced for the Angel of Death - The Dr. Edith Eva Eger Story
original_title: I Danced for the Angel of Death - The Dr. Edith Eva Eger Story
overview: Dr. Edith Eva Eger recounts her story of survival as a prisoner at Auschwitz concentration camp, her struggle with survivor's guilt and how her work as a psychologist has helped her grow and heal.
